name: provenance entry supporting_prs item missing the verbatim_quote field is rejected by the validator
command: printf '{"class":"pr-corpus","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1}],"evidence_count":1,"organizations_count":1}\n' > prov.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-provenance.sh" --provenance prov.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*verbatim_quote' err.txt && grep -q 'pr=1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
